history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with glasses is sitting on a black stool, exhaling a cloud of smoke that surrounds his head, creating a hazy effect. He's wearing a black zip-up hoodie with white bird graphics on the sleeves and chest, a white t-shirt underneath, and dark grey jeans. A maroon cloth is draped over his lap. His hands are clasped together, resting on his knee. He's wearing black slides.

The background appears to be an outdoor setting at night, possibly a street food stall or casual eatery. To the left, there's a wooden table with two plastic cups containing beverages and a white smartphone. Further back, another person's legs and feet in jeans and sandals are visible, along with a black stool. To the right, a blue and green weathered table stands with a red plate and a teacup and saucer. The ground is asphalt with scattered debris.

The lighting is dim and appears to come from artificial sources, casting soft shadows and highlighting the smoke. The color palette is dominated by dark tones (black, grey, dark blue) with pops of white from the graphics and smoke, and the vibrant blue and green of the table. The overall mood is relaxed and slightly moody, with a sense of candidness. The style is realistic, capturing a moment in time.
